title: 5q12's Concrete
description: An expansive Creative mod that adds hundreds of new concrete building blocks for more availability to your creativity when building.
body:
This mod adds many new concrete-like blocks (plain colored building blocks) there are 45 color variants of every type of concrete the concrete types are as specified, 
- Concrete Blocks (Normal block) 
- Concrete Stairs (Normal stairs)
- Concrete Slabs (Normal Slabs) 
- Concrete Vertical Stairs (A Stair-like block but rotated vertically) 
- Concrete Vertical Slabs (A slab-like block but rotated vertically) 
- Concrete Pillars (A-pillar block that can be placed vertically and horizontally) 
- Concrete Corner Pillars (A half stair-type block, that can be placed vertically and horizontally)
- Concrete Panels (Like the front of a normal block handy for covering up ugly Redstone)
- Concrete Cubes (A 1x1 little cube)
- Rainbow Concrete (An animation of every color in the mod on every concrete variant).
